name: Invoice chaser
description: Sent invoices coming due within three days get a polite reminder drafted to the client — you review and send.
prompt: Watch my sent invoices. When one is due within the next three days, draft (never send) a short, polite payment reminder to the client naming the invoice number, amount, and due date. I will review and send the drafts myself.

vault.why: Watches sent invoices coming due and drafts payment reminders to the client — drafts only, sending stays yours.
